revision.text:
Template shortcut:
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{tl|{{{1}}}}}|{{tl|{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{tl|{{{2}}}}}}}
This template provides the name of shortcut that template, specified by a parameter. Copied and pasted (with adjustments) from {{tl|shortcut}}. If you want to indicate that {{tl|uw-vandalism1}}'s shortcuts are {{tl|uw-v1}} and {{tl|uw-vand1}}, you could do :{{template shortcut|uw-v1}} {{template shortcut|uw-v1}} or :{{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1}} {{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1}} on that page.

Template shortcut:
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{tl|{{{1}}}}}|{{tl|{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{tl|{{{2}}}}}}}
This template provides the name of shortcut that template, specified by a parameter. Copied and pasted (with adjustments) from {{tl|shortcut}}. If you want to indicate that {{tl|uw-vandalism1}}'s shortcuts are {{tl|uw-v1}} and {{tl|uw-vand1}}, you could do :{{template shortcut|uw-v1}} {{template shortcut|uw-v1}} or :{{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1}} {{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1}} on that page.

revision.comment: frustrating. Also add th closing tag
revision.text:
Template shortcut:
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{tl|{{{1}}}}}|{{tl|{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{tl|{{{2}}}}}}}
This template provides the name of shortcut that template, specified by a parameter. Copied and pasted (with adjustments) from {{tl|shortcut}}. If you want to indicate that {{tl|uw-vandalism1}}'s shortcuts are {{tl|uw-v1}} and {{tl|uw-vand1}}, you could do :{{template shortcut|uw-v1}} {{template shortcut|uw-v1}} or :{{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1}} {{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1}} on that page.

Template shortcut:
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{tl|{{{1}}}}}|{{tl|{{lcfirst:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}} {{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{tl|{{{2}}}}}}} {{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{tl|{{{3}}}}}}}
This template provides the name of shortcut that template, specified by a parameter. Copied and pasted (with adjustments) from {{tl|shortcut}}. If you want to indicate that {{tl|uw-vandalism1}}'s shortcuts are {{tl|uw-v1}}, {{tl|uw-vandal1}}, and {{tl|uw-vand1}}, you could do :{{template shortcut|uw-v1}} {{template shortcut|uw-v1}} or :{{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1}} {{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1}} or :{{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1|uw-vandal1}} {{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1|uw-vandal1}} on that page.

revision.comment: redirect = no. No point in clicking on a link, only to be redirected back to the same page!
revision.text:
Template shortcut:
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{tl|{{{1}}}}}|{{[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1}}}]}}}} {{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1}}}]}}}}
This template provides the name of shortcut that template, specified by a parameter. Copied and pasted (with adjustments) from {{tl|shortcut}}. If you want to indicate that {{tl|uw-vandalism1}}'s shortcuts are {{tl|uw-v1}}, {{tl|uw-vandal1}}, and {{tl|uw-vand1}}, you could do :{{template shortcut|uw-v1}} {{template shortcut|uw-v1}} or :{{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1}} {{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1}} or :{{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1|uw-vandal1}} {{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1|uw-vandal1}} on that page.

revision.comment: there may not be monotony, but I'm seeing it.
revision.text:
Template shortcut:
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{tl|{{{1}}}}}|{{[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}} {{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}
This template provides the name of shortcut that template, specified by a parameter. Copied and pasted (with adjustments) from {{tl|shortcut}}. If you want to indicate that {{tl|uw-vandalism1}}'s shortcuts are {{tl|uw-v1}}, {{tl|uw-vandal1}}, and {{tl|uw-vand1}}, you could do :{{template shortcut|uw-v1}} {{template shortcut|uw-v1}} or :{{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1}} {{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1}} or :{{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1|uw-vandal1}} {{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1|uw-vandal1}} on that page.

Template shortcut:
{{[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}} {{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}
This template provides the name of shortcut that template, specified by a parameter. Copied and pasted (with adjustments) from {{tl|shortcut}}. If you want to indicate that {{tl|uw-vandalism1}}'s shortcuts are {{tl|uw-v1}}, {{tl|uw-vandal1}}, and {{tl|uw-vand1}}, you could do :{{template shortcut|uw-v1}} {{template shortcut|uw-v1}} or :{{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1}} {{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1}} or :{{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1|uw-vandal1}} {{template shortcut|uw-v1|uw-vand1|uw-vandal1}} on that page.

Template shortcut:
{{[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}} {{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}
{{template doc}}

Template shortcut:
{{[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}} {{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{[{{SERVER}}{{localurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}
{{clear}}{{template doc}}

revision.comment: server localurl -> fullurl; add {{{pre|}}} for prefix (like subst:)
revision.text:
Template shortcut:
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}
{{clear}}{{template doc}}

revision.comment: avoid [[Template:Fullurl:Template:]] showing up in lists of transcluded templates if {{{1}}} etc. is empty
revision.text:
Template shortcut:
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{if:{{{1}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}|{{{dummy}}}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}
{{clear}}{{template doc}}

Template shortcut:
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}
{{clear}}{{template doc}}

revision.comment: avoid Template:Fullurl:Template: showing up in lists of transcluded templates if {{{2}}} and/or {{{3}}} are empty
revision.text:
Template shortcut:
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{#if:{{{2}}}|{{{2}}}|{{{dummy}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{#if:{{{3}}}|{{{3}}}|{{{dummy}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}
{{clear}}{{template doc}}

Template shortcut:
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{#if:{{{2}}}|{{{2}}}|[]}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{#if:{{{3}}}|{{{3}}}|[]}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}
{{clear}}{{template doc}}

Template shortcut:
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{#if:{{{2}}}|{{{2}}}|{{{dummy}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{#if:{{{3}}}|{{{3}}}|{{{dummy}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}
{{clear}}{{template doc}} {{{Dummy}}}} 㸛

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Katswockmyswocks|Katswockmyswocks]] ([[User talk:Katswockmyswocks|talk]]) to last version by Patrick
revision.text:
Template shortcut:
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{#if:{{{2}}}|{{{2}}}|[]}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{#if:{{{3}}}|{{{3}}}|[]}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}
{{clear}}{{template doc}}

{{CAP}}
Template shortcut:
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{#if:{{{2}}}|{{{2}}}|[]}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{#if:{{{3}}}|{{{3}}}|[]}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}
{{clear}}{{template doc}}

Template shortcut:
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{#if:{{{2}}}|{{{2}}}|[]}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{#if:{{{3}}}|{{{3}}}|[]}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}
{{clear}}{{template doc}}

revision.comment: adding class, rm id since multiple uses can be present, changing to shorter "Shortcut" text, plural
revision.text:
Shortcut{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}:
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{#if:{{{2}}}|{{{2}}}|[]}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{#if:{{{3}}}|{{{3}}}|[]}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}
{{clear}}{{template doc}}

revision.comment: pre2, pre3 so each can be customized - doesn't look like anything uses this functionality, so shouldn't break anything
revision.text:
Shortcut{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}:
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{{{{pre2|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{#if:{{{2}}}|{{{2}}}|[]}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{{{{pre3|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{#if:{{{3}}}|{{{3}}}|[]}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}
{{clear}}{{template doc}}

Shortcut{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}:
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{{{{pre2|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{#if:{{{2}}}|{{{2}}}|[]}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{{{{pre3|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{#if:{{{3}}}|{{{3}}}|[]}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}
{{clear}}{{template doc}}

revision.comment: Copied new code from /sandbox. Major cleanup and some fixes. No real change in appearance.
revision.text:
Shortcut{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}:
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{{{{pre2|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{{{{pre3|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Removing newlines from the code, caused problems with dotted lists.
revision.text:
Shortcut{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}:
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{{{{pre2|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{{{{pre3|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}
{{Documentation}}

Shortcut{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}:
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{{{{pre2|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{{{{pre2|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|
{{{{{pre2|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{4}}}|redirect=no}} {{{4}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|
{{{{{pre2|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{5}}}|redirect=no}} {{{5}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|
{{{{{pre3|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{6}}}|redirect=no}} {{{6}}}]}}}}
{{Documentation}}

Shortcut{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}:
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{{{{pre2|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{{{{pre2|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|
{{{{{pre2|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{4}}}|redirect=no}} {{{4}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|
{{{{{pre2|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{5}}}|redirect=no}} {{{5}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|
{{{{{pre3|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{6}}}|redirect=no}} {{{6}}}]}}}}
{{Documentation}}

Shortcut{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}:
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{{{{pre2|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{{{{pre3|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|
{{{{{pre4|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{4}}}|redirect=no}} {{{4}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|

{{Documentation}}

{{{{{pre6|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{6}}}|redirect=no}} {{{6}}}]}}}}
{{Documentation}}

Shortcut{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}:
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{{{{pre2|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|
{{{{{pre3|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|

{{Documentation}}

Shortcut{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}:
{{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|

{{{{{pre6|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{6}}}|redirect=no}} {{{6}}}]}}}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: sync from sandbox, per request at [[Template talk:Template shortcut#Plainlist]]
revision.text:
Shortcut{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}:
* {{{{{pre|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}| * {{{{{pre2|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}| * {{{{{pre3|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}| * {{{{{pre4|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{4}}}|redirect=no}} {{{4}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}| * {{{{{pre5|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{5}}}|redirect=no}} {{{5}}}]}}}}{{#if:{{{6|}}}| * {{{{{pre6|}}}[{{fullurl:Template:{{{6}}}|redirect=no}} {{{6}}}]}}}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Make non-existent links appear red per protected edit request
revision.text:
Shortcut{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}:
* {{{{{pre|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{1}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1}}}] | [[Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]] }}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}| * {{{{{pre2|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{2}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}] | [[Template:{{{2}}}|{{{2}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}| * {{{{{pre3|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{3}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}] | [[Template:{{{3}}}|{{{3}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}| * {{{{{pre4|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{4}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{4}}}|redirect=no}} {{{4}}}] | [[Template:{{{4}}}|{{{4}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}| * {{{{{pre5|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{5}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{5}}}|redirect=no}} {{{5}}}] | [[Template:{{{5}}}|{{{5}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{6|}}}| * {{{{{pre6|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{6}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{6}}}|redirect=no}} {{{6}}}] | [[Template:{{{6}}}|{{{6}}}]] }}}}}}
{{Documentation}}

Shortcut{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}:
* {{{{{pre|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{1}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1}}}] | [[Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]] }}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}| * {{{{{pre2|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{2}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}] | [[Template:{{{2}}}|{{{2}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}| * {{{{{pre3|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{3}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}] | [[Template:{{{3}}}|{{{3}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}| * {{{{{pre4|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{4}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{4}}}|redirect=no}} {{{4}}}] | [[Template:{{{4}}}|{{{4}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}| * {{{{{pre5|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{5}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{5}}}|redirect=no}} {{{5}}}] | [[Template:{{{5}}}|{{{5}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{6|}}}| * {{{{{pre6|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{6}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{6}}}|redirect=no}} {{{6}}}] | [[Template:{{{6}}}|{{{6}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{7|}}}| * {{{{{pre7|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{7}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{7}}}|redirect=no}} {{{7}}}] | [[Template:{{{7}}}|{{{7}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{8|}}}| * {{{{{pre8|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{8}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{8}}}|redirect=no}} {{{8}}}] | [[Template:{{{8}}}|{{{8}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{9|}}}| * {{{{{pre9|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{9}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{9}}}|redirect=no}} {{{9}}}] | [[Template:{{{9}}}|{{{9}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{10|}}}| * {{{{{pre10|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{10}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{10}}}|redirect=no}} {{{10}}}] | [[Template:{{{10}}}|{{{10}}}]] }}}}}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:Template shortcut: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: reduce protection ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
revision.text:
Shortcut{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}:
* {{{{{pre|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{1}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1}}}] | [[Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]] }}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}| * {{{{{pre2|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{2}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}] | [[Template:{{{2}}}|{{{2}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}| * {{{{{pre3|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{3}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}] | [[Template:{{{3}}}|{{{3}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}| * {{{{{pre4|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{4}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{4}}}|redirect=no}} {{{4}}}] | [[Template:{{{4}}}|{{{4}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}| * {{{{{pre5|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{5}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{5}}}|redirect=no}} {{{5}}}] | [[Template:{{{5}}}|{{{5}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{6|}}}| * {{{{{pre6|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{6}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{6}}}|redirect=no}} {{{6}}}] | [[Template:{{{6}}}|{{{6}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{7|}}}| * {{{{{pre7|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{7}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{7}}}|redirect=no}} {{{7}}}] | [[Template:{{{7}}}|{{{7}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{8|}}}| * {{{{{pre8|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{8}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{8}}}|redirect=no}} {{{8}}}] | [[Template:{{{8}}}|{{{8}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{9|}}}| * {{{{{pre9|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{9}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{9}}}|redirect=no}} {{{9}}}] | [[Template:{{{9}}}|{{{9}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{10|}}}| * {{{{{pre10|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{10}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{10}}}|redirect=no}} {{{10}}}] | [[Template:{{{10}}}|{{{10}}}]] }}}}}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: add optional clear parameter, with syntax that matches [[template:stack]] (see talk)
revision.text:
Shortcut{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}:
* {{{{{pre|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{1}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1}}}] | [[Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]] }}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}| * {{{{{pre2|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{2}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}] | [[Template:{{{2}}}|{{{2}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}| * {{{{{pre3|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{3}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}] | [[Template:{{{3}}}|{{{3}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{4|}}}| * {{{{{pre4|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{4}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{4}}}|redirect=no}} {{{4}}}] | [[Template:{{{4}}}|{{{4}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}| * {{{{{pre5|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{5}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{5}}}|redirect=no}} {{{5}}}] | [[Template:{{{5}}}|{{{5}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{6|}}}| * {{{{{pre6|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{6}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{6}}}|redirect=no}} {{{6}}}] | [[Template:{{{6}}}|{{{6}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{7|}}}| * {{{{{pre7|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{7}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{7}}}|redirect=no}} {{{7}}}] | [[Template:{{{7}}}|{{{7}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{8|}}}| * {{{{{pre8|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{8}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{8}}}|redirect=no}} {{{8}}}] | [[Template:{{{8}}}|{{{8}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{9|}}}| * {{{{{pre9|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{9}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{9}}}|redirect=no}} {{{9}}}] | [[Template:{{{9}}}|{{{9}}}]] }}}}}}{{#if:{{{10|}}}| * {{{{{pre10|}}}{{#ifexist: Template:{{{10}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{10}}}|redirect=no}} {{{10}}}] | [[Template:{{{10}}}|{{{10}}}]] }}}}}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Update from sandbox/testcases ("top" parameter per {{TOC left}}, no colon)
revision.text:
Shortcut{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}
* {{{{{pre|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{1}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1}}}] |[[Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]}}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}} | * {{{{{pre2|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{2}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}] |[[Template:{{{2}}}|{{{2}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}} | * {{{{{pre3|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{3}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}] |[[Template:{{{3}}}|{{{3}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{4|}}} | * {{{{{pre4|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{4}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{4}}}|redirect=no}} {{{4}}}] |[[Template:{{{4}}}|{{{4}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{5|}}} | * {{{{{pre5|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{5}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{5}}}|redirect=no}} {{{5}}}] |[[Template:{{{5}}}|{{{5}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{6|}}} | * {{{{{pre6|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{6}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{6}}}|redirect=no}} {{{6}}}] |[[Template:{{{6}}}|{{{6}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{7|}}} | * {{{{{pre7|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{7}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{7}}}|redirect=no}} {{{7}}}] |[[Template:{{{7}}}|{{{7}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{8|}}} | * {{{{{pre8|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{8}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{8}}}|redirect=no}} {{{8}}}] |[[Template:{{{8}}}|{{{8}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{9|}}} | * {{{{{pre9|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{9}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{9}}}|redirect=no}} {{{9}}}] |[[Template:{{{9}}}|{{{9}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{10|}}} | * {{{{{pre10|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{10}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{10}}}|redirect=no}} {{{10}}}] |[[Template:{{{10}}}|{{{10}}}]]}}}}}}
{{Documentation}}

Shortcut{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}
* {{{{{pre|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{1}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1}}}|redirect=no}} {{{1}}}] |[[Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]}}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}} | * {{{{{pre2|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{2}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2}}}] |[[Template:{{{2}}}|{{{2}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}} | * {{{{{pre3|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{3}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{{3}}}] |[[Template:{{{3}}}|{{{3}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{4|}}} | * {{{{{pre4|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{4}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{4}}}|redirect=no}} {{{4}}}] |[[Template:{{{4}}}|{{{4}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{5|}}} | * {{{{{pre5|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{5}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{5}}}|redirect=no}} {{{5}}}] |[[Template:{{{5}}}|{{{5}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{6|}}} | * {{{{{pre6|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{6}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{6}}}|redirect=no}} {{{6}}}] |[[Template:{{{6}}}|{{{6}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{7|}}} | * {{{{{pre7|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{7}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{7}}}|redirect=no}} {{{7}}}] |[[Template:{{{7}}}|{{{7}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{8|}}} | * {{{{{pre8|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{8}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{8}}}|redirect=no}} {{{8}}}] |[[Template:{{{8}}}|{{{8}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{9|}}} | * {{{{{pre9|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{9}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{9}}}|redirect=no}} {{{9}}}] |[[Template:{{{9}}}|{{{9}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{10|}}} | * {{{{{pre10|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{10}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{10}}}|redirect=no}} {{{10}}}] |[[Template:{{{10}}}|{{{10}}}]]}}}}}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Update via sandbox/testcases (parameter whitespace removal, "Redirect/s" option)
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{redirect|}}} |Redirect |Shortcut}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}
* {{{{{pre|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{1}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{1}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{#if:true|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]]}}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}} | * {{{{{pre2|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{2}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{2}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{2}}}|{{#if:true|{{{2}}}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}} | * {{{{{pre3|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{3}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{3}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{3}}}|{{#if:true|{{{3}}}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{4|}}} | * {{{{{pre4|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{4}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{4}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{4}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{4}}}|{{#if:true|{{{4}}}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{5|}}} | * {{{{{pre5|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{5}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{5}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{5}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{5}}}|{{#if:true|{{{5}}}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{6|}}} | * {{{{{pre6|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{6}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{6}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{6}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{6}}}|{{#if:true|{{{6}}}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{7|}}} | * {{{{{pre7|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{7}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{7}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{7}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{7}}}|{{#if:true|{{{7}}}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{8|}}} | * {{{{{pre8|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{8}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{8}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{8}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{8}}}|{{#if:true|{{{8}}}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{9|}}} | * {{{{{pre9|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{9}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{9}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{9}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{9}}}|{{#if:true|{{{9}}}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{10|}}} | * {{{{{pre10|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{10}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{10}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{10}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{10}}}|{{#if:true|{{{10}}}}}]]}}}}}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: div instead of single-cell layout table (mirrors changes to [[Module:Shortcut]])
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{redirect|}}} |Redirect |Shortcut}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}
* {{{{{pre|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{1}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{1}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{#if:true|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]]}}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}} | * {{{{{pre2|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{2}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{2}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{2}}}|{{#if:true|{{{2}}}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{3|}}} | * {{{{{pre3|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{3}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{3}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{3}}}|{{#if:true|{{{3}}}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{4|}}} | * {{{{{pre4|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{4}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{4}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{4}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{4}}}|{{#if:true|{{{4}}}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{5|}}} | * {{{{{pre5|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{5}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{5}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{5}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{5}}}|{{#if:true|{{{5}}}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{6|}}} | * {{{{{pre6|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{6}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{6}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{6}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{6}}}|{{#if:true|{{{6}}}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{7|}}} | * {{{{{pre7|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{7}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{7}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{7}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{7}}}|{{#if:true|{{{7}}}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{8|}}} | * {{{{{pre8|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{8}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{8}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{8}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{8}}}|{{#if:true|{{{8}}}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{9|}}} | * {{{{{pre9|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{9}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{9}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{9}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{9}}}|{{#if:true|{{{9}}}}}]]}}}}}}{{#if:{{{10|}}} | * {{{{{pre10|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{10}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{10}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{10}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{10}}}|{{#if:true|{{{10}}}}}]]}}}}}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: update style to match {{shortcut}}, per talk
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{redirect|}}} |Redirect |Shortcut}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}
{{bulleted list | {{#if: {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}} | {{{{{pre|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{1}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{1}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{#if:true|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{2|}}} | {{{{{pre2|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{2}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{2}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{2}}}|{{#if:true|{{{2}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{3|}}} | {{{{{pre3|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{3}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{3}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{3}}}|{{#if:true|{{{3}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{4|}}} | {{{{{pre4|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{4}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{4}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{4}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{4}}}|{{#if:true|{{{4}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{5|}}} | {{{{{pre5|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{5}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{5}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{5}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{5}}}|{{#if:true|{{{5}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{6|}}} | {{{{{pre6|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{6}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{6}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{6}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{6}}}|{{#if:true|{{{6}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{7|}}} | {{{{{pre7|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{7}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{7}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{7}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{7}}}|{{#if:true|{{{7}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{8|}}} | {{{{{pre8|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{8}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{8}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{8}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{8}}}|{{#if:true|{{{8}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{9|}}} | {{{{{pre9|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{9}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{9}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{9}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{9}}}|{{#if:true|{{{9}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{10|}}} | {{{{{pre10|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{10}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{10}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{10}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{10}}}|{{#if:true|{{{10}}}}}]]}}}} }}}}
{{Documentation}}

{{Tfm/dated|page=Template shortcut|otherpage=Shortcut|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2021 February 1#Template:Template shortcut|type=sidebar|help=off|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}
{{#if:{{{redirect|}}} |Redirect |Shortcut}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}
{{bulleted list | {{#if: {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}} | {{{{{pre|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{1}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{1}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{#if:true|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{2|}}} | {{{{{pre2|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{2}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{2}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{2}}}|{{#if:true|{{{2}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{3|}}} | {{{{{pre3|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{3}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{3}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{3}}}|{{#if:true|{{{3}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{4|}}} | {{{{{pre4|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{4}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{4}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{4}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{4}}}|{{#if:true|{{{4}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{5|}}} | {{{{{pre5|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{5}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{5}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{5}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{5}}}|{{#if:true|{{{5}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{6|}}} | {{{{{pre6|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{6}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{6}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{6}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{6}}}|{{#if:true|{{{6}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{7|}}} | {{{{{pre7|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{7}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{7}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{7}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{7}}}|{{#if:true|{{{7}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{8|}}} | {{{{{pre8|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{8}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{8}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{8}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{8}}}|{{#if:true|{{{8}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{9|}}} | {{{{{pre9|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{9}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{9}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{9}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{9}}}|{{#if:true|{{{9}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{10|}}} | {{{{{pre10|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{10}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{10}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{10}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{10}}}|{{#if:true|{{{10}}}}}]]}}}} }}}}
{{Documentation}}

{{Tfm/dated|page=Template shortcut|otherpage=Shortcut|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2021 February 1#Template:Template shortcut|type=tiny|help=off|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}
{{#if:{{{redirect|}}} |Redirect |Shortcut}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}
{{bulleted list | {{#if: {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}} | {{{{{pre|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{1}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{1}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{#if:true|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{2|}}} | {{{{{pre2|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{2}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{2}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{2}}}|{{#if:true|{{{2}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{3|}}} | {{{{{pre3|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{3}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{3}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{3}}}|{{#if:true|{{{3}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{4|}}} | {{{{{pre4|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{4}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{4}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{4}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{4}}}|{{#if:true|{{{4}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{5|}}} | {{{{{pre5|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{5}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{5}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{5}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{5}}}|{{#if:true|{{{5}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{6|}}} | {{{{{pre6|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{6}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{6}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{6}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{6}}}|{{#if:true|{{{6}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{7|}}} | {{{{{pre7|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{7}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{7}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{7}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{7}}}|{{#if:true|{{{7}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{8|}}} | {{{{{pre8|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{8}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{8}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{8}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{8}}}|{{#if:true|{{{8}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{9|}}} | {{{{{pre9|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{9}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{9}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{9}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{9}}}|{{#if:true|{{{9}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{10|}}} | {{{{{pre10|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{10}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{10}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{10}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{10}}}|{{#if:true|{{{10}}}}}]]}}}} }}}}
{{Documentation}}

{{Tfm/dated|page=Template shortcut|otherpage=Shortcut|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2021 February 1#Template:Template shortcut|type=sidebar|help=off|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}
{{#if:{{{redirect|}}} |Redirect |Shortcut}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}
{{bulleted list | {{#if: {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}} | {{{{{pre|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{1}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{1}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{#if:true|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{2|}}} | {{{{{pre2|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{2}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{2}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{2}}}|{{#if:true|{{{2}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{3|}}} | {{{{{pre3|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{3}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{3}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{3}}}|{{#if:true|{{{3}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{4|}}} | {{{{{pre4|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{4}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{4}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{4}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{4}}}|{{#if:true|{{{4}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{5|}}} | {{{{{pre5|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{5}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{5}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{5}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{5}}}|{{#if:true|{{{5}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{6|}}} | {{{{{pre6|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{6}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{6}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{6}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{6}}}|{{#if:true|{{{6}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{7|}}} | {{{{{pre7|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{7}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{7}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{7}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{7}}}|{{#if:true|{{{7}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{8|}}} | {{{{{pre8|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{8}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{8}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{8}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{8}}}|{{#if:true|{{{8}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{9|}}} | {{{{{pre9|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{9}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{9}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{9}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{9}}}|{{#if:true|{{{9}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{10|}}} | {{{{{pre10|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{10}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{10}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{10}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{10}}}|{{#if:true|{{{10}}}}}]]}}}} }}}}
{{Documentation}}

{{#if:{{{redirect|}}} |Redirect |Shortcut}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|s}}
{{bulleted list | {{#if: {{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}} | {{{{{pre|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{1}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{1}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{1}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{#if:true|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{2|}}} | {{{{{pre2|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{2}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{2}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{2}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{2}}}|{{#if:true|{{{2}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{3|}}} | {{{{{pre3|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{3}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{3}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{3}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{3}}}|{{#if:true|{{{3}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{4|}}} | {{{{{pre4|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{4}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{4}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{4}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{4}}}|{{#if:true|{{{4}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{5|}}} | {{{{{pre5|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{5}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{5}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{5}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{5}}}|{{#if:true|{{{5}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{6|}}} | {{{{{pre6|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{6}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{6}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{6}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{6}}}|{{#if:true|{{{6}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{7|}}} | {{{{{pre7|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{7}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{7}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{7}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{7}}}|{{#if:true|{{{7}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{8|}}} | {{{{{pre8|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{8}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{8}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{8}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{8}}}|{{#if:true|{{{8}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{9|}}} | {{{{{pre9|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{9}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{9}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{9}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{9}}}|{{#if:true|{{{9}}}}}]]}}}} }} | {{#if:{{{10|}}} | {{{{{pre10|}}}{{#ifexist:Template:{{{10}}} |[{{fullurl:Template:{{{10}}}|redirect=no}} {{#if:true|{{{10}}}}}] |[[Template:{{{10}}}|{{#if:true|{{{10}}}}}]]}}}} }}}}
{{Tfm/dated|page=Template shortcut|otherpage=Shortcut|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2021 February 1#Template:Template shortcut|type=tiny|help=off|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 「[[Template:Template shortcut]]」を保護しました: [[WP:HRT|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]] ([編集=自動承認された利用者のみ許可] (無期限) [移動=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限))
1 revision imported: trying to fix templates that I messed up
1 revision imported: importing these ahead in time so that it does not mess up
1 revision imported: importing everything for the citation needed templates
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

1 revision imported: importing [[Template:Commons category]] from English wikipedia with removed timestamps to overwrite existing code, attempting to fix an error that makes the link not properly appear.
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors

1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
1 revision imported: overwriting to try to fix the lower alpha issue
1 revision imported: overwriting to try to fix the lower alpha issue
